name: Velvet Cake-TVFN
recipeInstructions:
Cake: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9-inch springform pan. Beat together eggs and sugar on high speed until pale lemon colored. Fold flour into egg mixture until well blended. Add in melted semisweet and unsweet chocolates, stirring just to combine. Pour into prepared pan. Bake 25-35 minutes or until toothpick inserted into center comes out clean. Cool for 15 minutes. Carefully remove sides of pan. Cool completely.
White chocolate sauce: In a small saucepan, mix together whipping cream and powdered sugar. Bring to a boil over low heat. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla milk chips until smooth. Refrigerate until thickened (about 1-2 hours). Store in refrigerator until ready to use.
Raspberry sauce: Puree raspberries in a blender. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve to remove seeds. Stir in jam and liqueur. To serve, spoon about 2 tablespoons white chocolate sauce onto a dessert plate. Drizzle about 2 teaspoons raspberry sauce over the cake. Place a slice of cake on top of the sauces.
